name: HubSpot
description: Monitor HubSpot user access and contact owners for CRM compliance and access management

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to HubSpot
2. Go to Settings > Integrations > Private Apps
3. Create a new private app
4. Add scopes: settings.users.read, crm.objects.owners.read
5. Copy and paste the access token below

credentialFields.label: Private App Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create a Private App in HubSpot > Settings > Integrations > Private Apps

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews HubSpot users to verify employee access management

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Lists HubSpot CRM contact owners for contact information compliance
